problem id: c395b6ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  11010100 -> 00111111
  01010111 -> 11011111
  10010000 -> 00110110
  00010101 -> 01000111
  11011001 -> 01111111
  01101010 -> 10011111
  11010110 -> 10111111
  10100001 -> 01111100
  00001001 -> 01000011
  01100011 -> 11011100

query: 00001100
predicted answer: 00000011
